title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Malabar Gold & Diamonds

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Malabar Gold & Diamonds
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Malabar Gold & Diamonds in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
